html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Shadow Rift

“A working heart that used to have a new body.”

-

The Possessed Shadow Atrium is a mob-like item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. To get the Possessed Shadow Atrium, the player has to put a Shadow Atrium inside an Ornery Chest before it wakes or let it eat the Shadow Atrium on the ground, and then kill the Ornery Chest. When dropped, it will stay as an item that can be picked up for a short amount of time, and after a few seconds, it starts to run away from the players.

Once The Possessed Shadow Atrium starts to move, it cannot be targeted. The only way to pick it up is by using a Trap.

Unlike a Shadow Atrium, the Possessed Shadow Atrium cannot be given to the Odd Skeleton in order to start the Ancient Fuelweaver fight.

Possessed Shadow Atrium
Object Info

Source
Dropped by

"shadowheart_infused"
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Shadow Rift
“The power of science must have reanimated it...”
–Wilson
“Oh, ewww! Who would ever touch that?!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang is not shaking! Is manly flexing!!”
–Wolfgang
“It beats with a sorrow to span the skies and plumb the darkest seas.”
–Wendy
“THIS FLESHLING ORGAN PULSES WITH PURE EVIL!”
–WX-78
“This... This is no child's magic.”
–Wickerbottom
“Yeesh. Don't get that near me.”
–Woodie
“A pulse of malice and betrayal beats within.”
–Maxwell
“Blackest hearts. Darkest ömens.”
–Wigfrid
“Why does it make me feel so bad?”
–Webber
“That beef heart is almost certainly past its prime.”
–Warly
“Cold. But still beating...”
–Wormwood
“This is twisted.”
–Winona
“Oh, how neat! It continues to beat.”
–Wortox
“Feel... sad...”
–Wurt
“Look at that! I wonder what's keeping it alive?”
–Walter
“It's still beating...”
–Wanda
“A working heart that used to have a new body.”
-
The Possessed Shadow Atrium is a mob-like item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. To get the Possessed Shadow Atrium, the player has to put a Shadow Atrium inside an Ornery Chest before it wakes or let it eat the Shadow Atrium on the ground, and then kill the Ornery Chest. When dropped, it will stay as an item that can be picked up for a short amount of time, and after a few seconds, it starts to run away from the players.
Once The Possessed Shadow Atrium starts to move, it cannot be targeted. The only way to pick it up is by using a Trap.

{{Scrapbook Info|A working heart that used to have a new body.}}
The '''Possessed Shadow Atrium''' is a mob-like item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. To get the Possessed Shadow Atrium, the player has to put a [[Shadow Atrium]] inside an [[Ornery Chest]] before it wakes or let it eat the Shadow Atrium on the ground, and then kill the Ornery Chest. When dropped, it will stay as an item that can be picked up for a short amount of time, and after a few seconds, it starts to run away from the players. 

Once The Possessed Shadow Atrium starts to move, it cannot be targeted. The only way to pick it up is by using a [[Trap]].

Unlike a Shadow Atrium, the Possessed Shadow Atrium cannot be given to the [[Odd Skeleton]] in order to start the [[Ancient Fuelweaver]] fight.
